name: Maranata School Bus Svc Corp
recent_news: FMCSA MCS-150 updated 02/26/2025 — 50 power units / 54 drivers, intrastate FL passenger operation. Family-owned and -operated since founding by Cuban-American entrepreneur Ulises Arias in early 1990s.
fit_notes: Legitimate independent FL school-bus operator (~50 buses, Miami-Dade/Broward routes) — NOTE: input record's state/city (CA / Eva AL) and employee/revenue figures appear miscoded; actual HQ is Hialeah FL and fleet is ~50 buses, not 5,597 employees. Family-owned 30+-year operator is a credible smaller Summit tuck-in candidate in the South FL market, subject to confirming current ownership and contract renewal status.
